task_completion.description: Document Decompression Sickness / Caisson disease as an active condition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GNU Health patient record for John Zenon, look for the 'Conditions' or 'Diseases' section. It should list 'Decompression Sickness', 'Caisson disease', or an ICD-10 code starting with 'T70' (e.g., T70.3) and the status must be marked as 'Active'.

task_completion.description: Create a patient evaluation recording the specified acute vital signs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Patient Evaluation or Encounter form for John Zenon. It must display the specific vital signs: Heart Rate at 95 bpm, Respiratory Rate at 20, and Oxygen Saturation at 98%.

task_completion.description: Prescribe acute supportive therapy (Medical Oxygen or Sodium Chloride).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Medication or Prescription record for John Zenon that includes either 'Medical Oxygen' (100% O2) or 'Sodium Chloride' (IV fluids).

task_completion.description: Order at least 2 baseline laboratory tests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Lab Tests or Requests section for John Zenon. There must be at least two distinct laboratory tests ordered (e.g., Arterial Blood Gas [ABG], Complete Blood Count [CBC], Comprehensive Metabolic Panel [CMP], or similar baseline tests).

task_completion.description: Schedule a medical appointment for reassessment in 1 to 2 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Appointments record for John Zenon. The scheduled date should be 1 to 2 days in the future compared to the system date visible in the screenshot.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health desktop client or web interface being used, rather than terminal commands, scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual GNU Health application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must clearly be GNU Health (Tryton-based GUI), not a text editor, spreadsheet, or mocked-up form.

integrity.description: The agent applied the changes to the correct patient record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The name 'John Zenon' should be visible in the header or context of the screens where conditions, vitals, prescriptions, labs, and appointments are entered.
